title: BIRTH CERTIFICATES - 211info
text: WHITE BIRD CLINIC BIRTH CERTIFICATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with obtaining State of Oregon birth certificates. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-1295 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID or driver's license AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown on 12th Avenue between High Street and Mill Street Services: Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NEST MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CAHOOTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS COUNSELING HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WHITE BIRD CLINIC
